en.extract:
Forbes's mannikin (Lonchura forbesi) or the New Ireland munia, is a species of estrildid finch breeding in Papua New Guinea. It has an estimated global extent of occurrence of 20,000 to 50,000 km2 (7,700 to 19,300 sq mi). It is found in subtropical or tropical lowland dry grassland habitat. The status of the species is evaluated as Least Concern.


References

"BirdLife Species Factsheet". BirdLife International. Archived from the original on 29 September 2007.

zh.extract:
栗背文鸟（学名：Lonchura forbesi），是梅花雀科文鸟属的一种，为巴布亚新几内亚的特有种。该物种的保护状况被评为无危。
分布于太平洋诸岛屿。


参考文献
Lonchura forbesi. BirdLife.org.   [2011-06-27].
